items.title: Artists Threaten to Sue Venice Biennale
items.summary: Plus, Trump’s threats to arts education and why artist Saif Azzuz should be on your radar.

items.title: New Trump Rule Could Cut Enrollment at Nearly Half of Arts MA Programs
items.summary: The controversial proposal would measure alumni income to determine whether a program can matriculate students who take out federal loans.

items.title: ‘Masters of the Stitch: Threaded Stories’ Spotlights Narrative Quilts by Black Americans
items.summary: The exhibition at Claire Oliver Gallery spotlights remarkable narratives in fabric. Do stories and artists like this matter to you? Become a Colossal Member today and support independent arts publishi…

items.title: Radical Reclamation at the First-Ever ArtPhilly Festival
items.summary: Hyperallergic joined the artists and organizers for the opening week of the new city-wide event, featuring over 30 original commissions.
